## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on holiday schedule, SEO progress, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Holiday Schedule:** Publishing continues through Christmas week (Dec 22–26); the week of Dec 29–Jan 2 is quiet with no new content.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [**SEO Redirects:** The large-scale redirect project is nearly complete; batches 2 & 2.5 are expected to finish by Friday, Dec 12.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** A Q1 plan to refresh older "Ketamine" articles will be developed, but changes to user-onboarding content will be minimal to avoid breaking the onboarding flow.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [**Performance:** Editorial traffic is showing strong week-over-week growth, validating the new content strategy. A new Looker dashboard tracks the redirect migration.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

## Topics

### SEO Redirects & Performance

  - [**Project Status:** Batches 2 & 2.5 of the large-scale redirect project are expected to be finished by Friday, Dec 12.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**City Page Routing:**](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
      - [**Ketamine City Pages** → Availability Page](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
      - [**State Pages** → Organic State Page](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [**Future Strategy:** The "Mental Health" city pages set a new UX standard. A Q1 discussion will decide if "Ketamine" city pages should be built to match this format.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [A new "Ketamine State Pages" Looker tab tracks traffic migration from old to new URLs, confirming the redirects are working.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [The "Editorial" dashboard shows strong week-over-week growth, validating the new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Content Strategy & Holiday Schedule

  - [**Article Reviews:** No articles require review this week. Last week's batch was approved and staged for publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [**Next Delivery:** Four new articles will be delivered by Monday, Dec 15.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Q1 Refresh Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [**Goal:** Refresh older "Ketamine" cluster articles to improve SEO (e.g., add H4s, internal links).](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Content used in the user onboarding flow must be handled with care.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [**Action:** Akina will provide a list of these sensitive articles to guide the refresh plan.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

### Deployment & Syncs

  - [**Redirect Deployment:** A final redirect deployment requires a sync between Isra (GrowthX) and Ilya (Innerwell).](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [**Urgency:** Ilya is out of office all next week. The sync must happen this week if it's a quick task (e.g., 5-10 mins). A longer deployment will be pushed to the new year.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [**Holiday Syncs:** Weekly syncs are canceled for the weeks of Dec 22 and Dec 29. GrowthX will monitor Slack for emergencies.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Akina:**](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [Send the list of user-onboarding articles to Matthew.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [Complete the SEO index page and footer cleanup.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [Confirm the redirect deployment timeline with Isra and notify Akina.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [Deliver four new articles by Monday, Dec 15.](https://fathom.video/share/yjSwYiekixrYzW-tzLUao9jjAJDW5QER?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
